name: awwwards-ui-skill
description: GOD MODE: The ultimate open-source UI Agent Skill. Empowers AI coding assistants (Antigravity, Claude Code, Codex) to autonomously design stunning, Awwwards-winning web interfaces. Injects WebGL, GSAP, Lenis smooth scrolling, strict accessibility (WCAG), and advanced CSS architectures directly into AI-generated frontends.
